title: Luna HD Resourcepack
description: Luna HD Resource Pack (1.21.3, 1.20.6) is inspired by the beauty of the moon itself. The Pack provides some of the most beautiful textures glued on 3D Models that are hand-crafted by the best artists in the community.
body:
You can find 128x-1024x versions here

Join Us On Discord 25,000+ members here

Luna HD Resource Pack (1.21.1, 1.20.6) is inspired by the beauty of the moon itself. The Pack provides some of the most beautiful textures glued on 3D Models that are hand-crafted by the best artists in the community. Luna is the perfect conflation between realism and cartoonist as players can feel the presence of both styles lingering in the game. As players progress through different sectors, they will experience another realm as everything is so distant yet exquisite and beautiful at the same time. Also Added LushGrass Addon for the pack for Version 1.20.4 and 1.19.4

Now with Minecraft 1.21.1 support
